messages:
{Hey|Hi|Hello} {username} 👋
Real question — are your ads actually converting, or just spending?
Most e-com stores have the same issue: targeting's fine, budget's there, but the creative is killing the ROAS. Wrong hooks, wrong format, wrong platform energy.
That's what we fix — Meta & TikTok ad systems, AI UGC, and short-form video built to convert, not just get views.
I can take a quick look at your store and give you a straight breakdown of what's hurting your numbers. No pitch, just clarity. Useful?
→ @cybersolu.agency

{Hey|Hi|Hello} {username}
Buyers don't trust brand ads anymore — they trust people. That's why AI UGC outperforms polished brand creative on almost every e-com vertical right now.
We build AI UGC ads for e-com stores and run them through Meta & TikTok ad systems tuned for conversions. The result is ad creative that feels native, builds trust fast, and actually sells.
Want me to show you what this could look like for your store?
→ @cybersolu.agency

{Hey|Hi|Hello} {username}
Organic only scales so far — after a point it just plateaus no matter how consistent you are.
Most stores we work with hit that wall and don't realize paid ads + the right creative is what breaks through it. Not more posting, not better hashtags.
We run Meta & TikTok ad systems with AI UGC built specifically for e-com conversions. If you're curious what that looks like for your store, I'm happy to take a look — no commitment.
Worth a conversation?
→ @cybersolu.agency

{Hey|Hi|Hello} {username}
Your competitors are running paid ads right now. The question is whether their creative is actually good — because most of it isn't.
That's the gap we help e-com brands close. Meta & TikTok ads paired with AI UGC that stops the scroll and actually converts.
If you want to see where your store stands and what a proper ad system could do for your numbers, I can put together a quick breakdown. Just say the word.
→ @cybersolu.agency

{Hey|Hi|Hello} {username}
Most e-com ads die in the first 2 seconds. Not because of the offer — because the creative doesn't stop the scroll fast enough.
We build AI UGC ads and short-form video specifically engineered for that first moment. Paired with a proper Meta or TikTok ad structure, it changes your cost-per-result fast.
Interested in seeing what that could look like for your brand?
→ @cybersolu.agency

{Hey|Hi|Hello} {username}
Quick one — are you running paid ads for your store?
If not, you're leaving a predictable revenue channel off the table. If yes, I'd be curious what your ROAS looks like — because most stores we audit are overspending for what they're getting back.
We handle Meta & TikTok ads + AI UGC for e-com brands. I can give your store a free look and tell you exactly what's off. Straight answer, no fluff. Open to it?
→ @cybersolu.agency

{Hey|Hi|Hello} {username}
High ad spend with weak returns usually comes down to one thing — the creative isn't built for the platform it's running on.
What works on Meta doesn't work on TikTok. What works organically definitely doesn't work as an ad. We build platform-native AI UGC and video that's engineered for conversions from the first frame.
Quick question — what's your current cost-per-purchase looking like? I can tell you fast whether there's room to improve it.
→ @cybersolu.agency

{Hey|Hi|Hello} {username}
Three things kill e-com ad performance every time: weak hooks, wrong platform format, and no testing system. Most stores are battling all three without knowing it.
We come in, audit the full picture, and rebuild the ad system — Meta & TikTok ads, AI UGC creative, short-form video — around what actually moves your numbers.
I'll do a free store audit and show you exactly which of those three is costing you. Takes 20 minutes on my end, zero on yours. Want it?
→ @cybersolu.agency

{Hey|Hi|Hello} {username}
There's a difference between a store that sells and a store that scales. The ones that scale have a paid traffic system behind them — not just good products.
We build that system. Meta & TikTok ads, AI UGC creative, and short-form video — all set up to grow with your store, not just run one-off campaigns.
If scaling is on your radar this year, I'd like to show you what we'd build for you. Free breakdown, no strings. Interested?
→ @cybersolu.agency

{Hey|Hi|Hello} {username}
TikTok is still the lowest cost-per-acquisition channel for e-com right now — but only if the creative matches how TikTok actually works. Most stores miss that completely.
We run TikTok + Meta ad systems with AI UGC built to convert in-feed. Brands using this combo are cutting their CAC while scaling volume at the same time.
Curious whether your store is set up to take advantage of it? Happy to take a look.
→ @cybersolu.agency
followups:
{Hey|Hi} {username}

Sent you something last week, not sure if it got buried.

Not going to repeat the whole thing. But one thing I keep seeing with e-com stores that are spending on ads: they're watching reach and impressions like those numbers mean something.

They don't. Three metrics actually matter: Cost Per Result, ROAS, and CTR. Everything else is just the platform making you feel busy.

If those three are off, no amount of budget fixes it.

We run Meta and TikTok ad systems for e-commerce brands, creatives, targeting, and the full setup. Happy to take a quick look at your numbers and tell you honestly if there's a problem. No charge.

Worth it?

→ @cybersolu.agency
